items.title: More leveraged deals, lower base effect spur brokerage recovery in Q3
items.description: Indian stockbrokers saw improved revenues and profits in the third quarter. Trading volumes increased, boosted by leveraged deals and higher interest income. Exchanges like BSE and NSE also reported growth. This performance was supported by strong activity in cash and derivatives markets, as well as healthy primary market participation. Volatility in commodities also lifted trading volumes.
